description: Style Note Carrying around a trendy and fashionable bag is not just about completing your outfit, you can also use your bag to make a style statement. This super cool and colourful choice from nike is a must have for your summer and monsoon collection. In evergreen black, you can pair the bag with bright summery colours and match your shoes and accessories with your bag. Product Details A big black tote bag with ample space with designed embellishment on one side Two short handles to sling it over your shoulders One main compartment with an internal open pocket and pink nylon lining Pink Nike swoosh on the front Material and Care 100% polyester exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 35 cm Width: 45 cm Depth: 10 cm
